name: New American Autoworks Ambunaught (Police Paramedic Version)

system.notes:
Police paramedic version of the New American Autoworks Ambunaught, built to extract wounded from hazardous environments. Armament: two 1800 Grenade Launchers (equal to Militech drum-type GLs w/Tear Gas), or a remote turret-mounted Deluge Crowd Control Weapon.

All armor for the vehicle is identical to the standard Ambunaught (Chromebook); armor SP/SDP are not restated in Protect & Serve, so SP and SDP are left at 0 here (see the standard Ambunaught for armor and passenger capacity). Standard paramedic inventory: Medscanner, 2x Surgical Kits, Cryotank, Spray Skin, Airhypos, Mastoid Communicators, Tech Tool Kit, Respirators; cab locker with 2x Armalite .44, 1x Militech Ronin, tool kit. Cost 76,000 eb. [Protect & Serve p.36-37]
